summary: A clipped Newsmax 'National Report' broadcast segment of a guest in studio discussing the DOL Inspector General's anti-fraud work, with a 'FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD' chyron. Raw cable-news capture, no music or original production. Out of scope.
notable_text: NEWSMAX NATIONAL REPORT; FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD
